title: Manufacturer Usage Description (MUD) for TLS and DTLS Profiles for Internet of Things (IoT) Devices
source: Operations and Management Area Working Group
abstract: This memo extends the Manufacturer Usage Description (MUD) specification to allow manufacturers to define TLS and DTLS profile parameters.  This allows a network security service to identify unexpected (D)TLS usage, which can indicate the presence of unauthorized software, malware, or security policy-violating traffic on an endpoint.
